title: Git Workflow
description: Understanding - the student can describe the three locations where Git stores data (working directory, local repo, GitHub) and which command moves data bet
creator: Moving Rainbow
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Moving Rainbow

learningObjectives: Understanding - the student can describe the three locations where Git stores data (working directory, local repo, GitHub) and which command moves data between them.

assessmentOpportunities: Students explain the demonstrated relationship in their own words.
